# Perth Concrete Care

> Perth Concrete Care provides polished concrete, honed concrete, grind and seal, and epoxy flooring for residential, commercial, hospitality, and industrial projects across Perth, Western Australia.

Last updated: 2026-05-22

## Core pages

- Home: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/
- Services: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/services
- Work examples: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/work
- Contact and quote request: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/contact#quote
- Agent-readable catalog: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/api/agent/catalog

## Services

- Polished concrete: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/services/polished
- Honed concrete: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/services/honed
- Grind and seal: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/services/grind-seal
- Epoxy coatings: https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/services/epoxy

## Canonical facts

- Business name: Perth Concrete Care
- ABN: 63 775 263 307
- Phone: 0448 483 226
- Email: sales@perthconcretecare.com.au
- Service area: Perth metro and surrounding suburbs in Western Australia
- Primary action: Request Quote at https://perthconcretepolishing.com.au/contact#quote

## Price guide

- Ultra Flake epoxy: $75 - $85 per square metre
- Hyper Flake epoxy: $90 - $100 per square metre
- Grind and seal: $65 - $95 per square metre
- Honed concrete: $120 - $160 per square metre
- Mechanical polish: $160 - $220 per square metre

Final pricing depends on site inspection, access, slab condition, repairs, exposure, coating specification, exclusions, GST treatment, and program.
